2606.21851.title: TALAS: Teacher-Anchored Layer Alignment with Adaptive Sharpness-Aware Minimization for Embedding Distillation
2606.21851.paper_summary: Knowledge Distillation (KD) has established itself as a pivotal technique for compressing large pre-trained language models. However, existing methods that force a student to strictly mimic the teacher's sentence embeddings or internal features often incur prohibitive computational costs and yield suboptimal performance due to the inherent capacity gap. To address these challenges, we propose TALAS (Teacher-Anchored Layer Alignment with Sharpness-aware minimization), a unified framework that synergizes hierarchical (multi-layer) alignment with robust optimization. First, we introduce a Teacher-Anchored mechanism that selectively distills final sentence embeddings only into the student's upper layers, thereby reducing overhead while respecting capacity constraints. Second, we bridge the semantic gap in lower layers via Layer-Aligned Self-Distillation, which propagates knowledge top-down using internal geometric relational constraints in the embedding space. Finally, to prevent the student from memorizing point-wise teacher noise, we integrate Adaptive Sharpness-Aware Minimization (ASAM) into the training objective, guiding the model towards flat minima for enhanced generalization. Empirical results on standard sentence embedding benchmarks demonstrate that TALAS consistently outperforms strong distillation baselines while achieving superior training efficiency in terms of computational cost and memory footprint.
2606.21851.paper_summary_zh: 知識蒸餾（KD）已確立為壓縮大型預訓練語言模型的關鍵技術。<lb/>然而，現有的方法強迫學生嚴格模仿教師的句子嵌入或內部特徵，往往會產生高昂的計算成本，並因固有的能力差距而導致次優的性能。<lb/>為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了TALAS（基於教師的層對齊與敏感度-aware最小化），這是一個統一框架，將分層（多層）對齊與穩健優化相結合。<lb/>首先，我們引入了一種基於教師的機制，僅將最終句子嵌入選擇性地蒸餾到學生的上層，從而在尊重能力限制的同時減少開銷。<lb/>其次，我們通過層對齊自我蒸餾來彌補下層的語義差距，這一過程使用嵌入空間中的內部幾何關係約束進行自上而下的知識傳播。<lb/>最後，為了防止學生記住逐點的教師噪聲，我們將自適應敏感度-aware最小化（ASAM）整合到訓練目標中，引導模型朝向平坦的最小值，以增強泛化能力。<lb/>在標準句子嵌入基準上的實證結果表明，TALAS在計算成本和內存佔用方面實現了優越的訓練效率，同時穩定地超越了強大的蒸餾基準。
2606.21851.author: Quoc Phong Dao et.al.
2606.21851.authors: Quoc Phong Dao, Hoang Son Nguyen, Pham Khanh Chi, Linh Ngo Van, Nguyen Thi Ngoc Diep, Thien Huu Nguyen, Trung Le
